subject: fix(tests): fix TypeScript build errors in test files
body:
- conditions.test.ts: add missing target_type and target_id to
  ConditionGroup objects. Extract group() helper with defaults to
  avoid repeating boilerplate fields in every test.
- validation.test.ts: remove duplicate 'type' property from makeField
  defaults — caller always provides type via the required override,
  so the default was always overwritten (TS2783).

Both fixes resolve tsc -b errors that broke the Vercel deploy.

Tags: testing, bug-fix, typescript
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ui-polish
Semver: patch
